name: Commando
description: Commando is a vertically scrolling, single-player, run-and-gun shooter. The player controls a lone soldier, Super Joe, infiltrating enemy territory. The core gameplay loop involves navigating through dense jungle and fortified areas, eliminating waves of enemy soldiers, turrets, and other obstacles. Joe is equipped with a submachine gun with unlimited ammunition and a limited supply of hand grenades. The submachine gun fires in a straight line in the direction Joe is facing. Grenades are lobbed over obstacles and explode after a short delay, affecting a small area of effect. The player must constantly move forward, dodging enemy fire and strategically deploying grenades to clear pathways. Levels culminate in encounters with larger enemy encampments or boss-like challenges. The player's health is represented by a single hit point; one hit from enemy fire or explosions results in death. Upon death, the player restarts from the beginning of the level or a designated checkpoint. The game features a variety of enemy types, each with distinct attack patterns and behaviors. Some enemies will approach directly, while others will take cover or fire from a distance. The environment is destructible to a limited extent, offering tactical advantages. The overall objective is to fight through enemy lines, destroy the enemy's headquarters, and rescue prisoners of war.
